title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp with a Z-Score of +3.20. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperatures are accompanied by high humidity of 85% and moderate winds of 9.5 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
